text:
Symptoms:

# service prosody start
Still waiting...
Prosody is still not running. Please give it some time or check your log files for errors.
# touch "/usr/local/var/lib/prosody/prosody.pid"
# chown prosody "/usr/local/var/lib/prosody/prosody.pid"
# service prosody start
Started
